$comment: Generic example license allowlist (enforcing policy) -- fixture content, not a real company's actual list. A dependency's declared license must appear under 'allow' to pass the automated security-scan gate; any license under 'deny' fails it outright. Licenses absent from both lists are treated as 'unknown' by the consuming scanner and typically require the same explicit exception path as a denied license (project-defined, not decided by this fixture).
